subject: Fermi GBM trigger 300370702 (100709513) is not a GRB
body:
S. Foley (MPE), reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 300370702 (100709513) at
12:18:20.44 UT
on 09 July 2010, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is due to a particle event entering the South
Atlantic Anomaly."
